title: euphorbia exigua subsp. retusa
intro: Euphorbia exigua subsp. retusa, also known as pencil plant or pencil cactus, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of diterpenoid compounds. The health benefits of Euphorbia exigua subsp. retusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Euphorbia exigua subsp. retusa is often prepared as a tincture, salve, or tea, and it can also be used topically to treat wounds and skin conditions.
